name: Brown Kiwi
conservationEfforts: Predator control programs across New Zealand. Kiwi sanctuaries with predator-proof fencing. Operation Nest Egg hatches eggs in captivity and releases chicks when large enough to avoid stoats.
description: New Zealand's iconic flightless bird with hair-like feathers and nostrils at the tip of its long bill. Despite being the national symbol, kiwi populations have declined by 90% in the last century.
